heroTitle: CliffRise is a way to give back to the rocks - every purchase supports the creation of new climbing routes.
causeP1: By choosing CliffRise chalk or any of our other products, you directly support the development of climbing areas in Bulgaria. Every purchase helps create new routes, maintain existing ones, and improve the places we all love to climb.
causeP2: CliffRise is a way to give back to the rocks and the climbing community. Your support helps us keep moving forward, bring new ideas to life, and continue growing climbing in Bulgaria.
aboutUsP1: United by their love for climbing and a desire to give something back to the community, Boiko Lalov and Alex Yanev began working together in 2020, developing the Peshterata (The Cave) crag near Ribaritsa. Shortly after, while establishing routes at Teteven/Zaslona, the idea for CliffRise was born.
aboutUsP2: United by their love for climbing and a desire to give something back to the community, Boiko Lalov and Alex Yanev began working together in 2020, developing the Peshterata (The Cave) crag near Ribaritsa. Shortly after, while establishing routes at Teteven/Zaslona, the idea for CliffRise was born.

eventsSection.text: Teteven Climbs brings together people who love climbing, movement, and time spent outdoors. Days on the rock, yoga, new connections, shared stories, and ideas - all surrounded by the beautiful nature of Teteven. The festival creates a space where the climbing community comes together naturally, with good vibes, shared projects, and the desire for more days on the rock.

contactForm.description2: If you’d like to get involved, support the work, or simply ask a question, write to us and we’ll get back to you.

feedbacks.maniac: I love the chalk texture. I have very dry skin, so it’s hard to find something that stays on my hands. I’m super happy to have found this chalk—it has everything I need and definitely boosts my confidence on the rock.
feedbacks.matey: If you want to take care of your climbing experience and make it with most pleasure, Cliffrise is your way to do it, they offer quality climbing tape, clothing, varieties of climbing chalk and so on!
